mechanistic_hypotheses.hypothesis: MLH1 modulates pathway response under varying exposure burden.
mechanistic_hypotheses.supporting_evidence: Curated integration of association, pathway, and epidemiologic evidence supports this relationship.

molecular_function: Pathway-level interaction under variable exposure conditions
name: MutL Homolog 1

regulatory_notes.enhancer_associations: MLH1 has enhancer associations in inflammatory and disease-linked contexts.
regulatory_notes.methylation_sensitivity: MLH1 expression may shift with methylation dynamics and exposure burden.
regulatory_notes.promoter_activity: MLH1 promoter activity is context-sensitive across curated tissue settings.

summary: MLH1 is modeled as a disease-relevant locus that links inherited architecture, pathway activity, and environmental sensitivity in GENARCH educational outputs.
